PurchaseReservedNat.natId: The ID of the NAT gateway to renew
PurchaseReservedNat.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
PurchaseReservedNat.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required when renewing an order
PurchaseReservedNat.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid
